query: CREATE TABLE `campaigns` (`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL, `userId` int NOT NULL, `metaId` varchar(64) NOT NULL, `name` varchar(255) NOT NULL, `status` varchar(32), `objective` varchar(64), `dailyBudget` float, `lifetimeBudget` float, `startTime` timestamp NULL, `stopTime` timestamp NULL, `rawData` json, `syncedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()), `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()), CONSTRAINT `campaigns_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`))
